title: The King of the Turf
writer: J. Grubb Alexander, John C. Brownell, Louis Joseph Vance
actors: George Irving, Patsy Ruth Miller, Kenneth Harlan
plot: Genteel southern horse-breeder Col. Richard Fairfax is framed on the charge of embezzlement by Martyn Selsby, his business partner, and sentenced to jail. Selsby soon dies of apoplexy, first dictating a confession to exonerate Fai...
